name: palette
description: Organizational context from Palette — team structure, priorities, projects, and working patterns for your AI conversations.
long_description:
Palette brings your organizational context into Claude. Once connected, Claude can access your team structure, priorities, projects, and working patterns to give you more relevant, context-aware responses.

Tools available:
- get-orgtology: Returns org context (full, organization, teams, or your profile)
- get-orgtology-updated-at: Check when context was last updated

Requires a Palette account. Authentication is handled via OAuth — you'll be prompted to sign in on first use.

tools.name: get-orgtology
tools.description: Returns organizational context: team structure, priorities, projects, working patterns, and user profile

tools.name: get-orgtology-updated-at
tools.description: Returns when the organization's context was last updated
